requirement_topic.en: EMC and EAC Marking for Portable Battery Products
requirement_topic.zh: 移动电源等便携式产品的EMC与EAC标志
requirement_topic.zht: 行動電源等便攜式產品之EMC與EAC標誌

summary.en: Power banks with integrated electronics in Kazakhstan are subject to EMC conformity review under EAEU TR CU 020/2011 through EAC technical-file logic. Products with radio, wireless charging, or communication functions additionally require the relevant EAEU technical requirements and telecom-type acceptance before market placement. Conformity evidence, marking language, and declarations must match the exact shipped configuration.
summary.zh: 在哈萨克斯坦，含有集成电子功能的移动电源属于EAEU TR CU 020/2011的电磁兼容审查范围，通过EAC技术文件逻辑实施。带有无线或通信功能的产品还需按EAEU相关技术要求及无线管理要求办理进入市场。证据、标识和声明应与实际出货配置一致。
summary.zht: 在哈薩克斯坦，含整合電子功能的行動電源屬於EAEU TR CU 020/2011的電磁相容審查範圍，透過EAC技術文件邏輯實施。具無線或通信功能產品還需按EAEU相關技術要求及無線管理要求辦理市場進入。證據、標識和聲明應與實際出貨配置一致。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 020/2011 On electromagnetic compatibility of technical devices
EAEU conformity route for EMC under EAC marking framework
Applicable EAEU telecom equipment acceptance rules where wireless functions are integrated

summary.en: Chinese EMC and radio testing for GB/T series products is useful for engineering but is not equivalent proof of EAEU EMC filing for Kazakhstan. Domestic SRRC or MIIT approvals are separate from EAEU TR CU 020/2011 obligations.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T系列产品的EMC和无线测试可用于工程参考，但不能替代哈萨克斯坦EAEU TR CU 020/2011 EMC入市证明。中国的SRRC或MIIT核准与EAEU义务是分开的。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T系列產品的EMC和無線測試可用於工程參考，但不能替代哈薩克斯坦EAEU TR CU 020/2011 EMC入市證明。中國的SRRC或MIIT核准與EAEU義務是分開的。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 series — EMC emission requirements for information technology equipment
SRRC/MITT approvals for domestic Chinese radio use

gap.en: The common gap is not test type but acceptance scope. CN lab reports often lack EAEU-referenced clause mapping for final SKU, mode settings, wireless channels, or in-country installation context. Exporters should map the report matrix to TR CU 020/2011 and retest where configuration-sensitive variants differ.
gap.zh: 常见差距并非测试类型，而是验收范围。中国实验室报告常未覆盖最终SKU、运行模式、无线通道或本地安装场景等EAEU对应条款映射。出口商应将报告逐条映射到TR CU 020/2011，对敏感配置差异进行补测。
gap.zht: 常見差距並非測試類型，而是驗收範圍。中國實驗室報告常未覆蓋最終SKU、運行模式、無線通道或本地安裝場景等EAEU對應條款映射。出口商應將報告逐條映射到TR CU 020/2011，對敏感配置差異進行補測。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for relevant in-scope power banks and battery products under TR CU 020/2011 in Kazakhstan
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN market EMC and MIIT/SRRC obligations where product categories are in scope

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Kazakhstan EAC market entry generally needs TR CU 020/2011 EMC confirmation for in-scope products, and wireless variants require the applicable telecom acceptance pathway. Chinese GB and SRRC records are not standalone replacement evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哈萨克斯坦入市通常要求TR CU 020/2011下的EMC确认，带无线功能的产品还需适用相应无线接入与审批路径。中国GB及SRRC材料不能单独替代该证明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哈薩克斯坦入市通常要求TR CU 020/2011下的EMC確認，具無線功能的產品還需適用對應無線接入與審批路徑。中國GB及SRRC材料不能單獨替代該證明。
